scripts.py:format: if test -x .venv/bin/python && command -v python3.13 >/dev/null; then PYTHONPATH=.venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages python3.13 -m black backend api; elif test -x .venv/bin/python; then .venv/bin/python -m black backend api; else python3 -m black backend api; fi
scripts.py:lint: if test -x .venv/bin/python; then .venv/bin/python -m ruff check backend api; else python3 -m ruff check backend api; fi
scripts.py:typecheck: if test -x .venv/bin/python; then .venv/bin/python -m mypy; else python3 -m mypy; fi
scripts.py:check: if test -x .venv/bin/python && command -v python3.13 >/dev/null; then PYTHONPATH=.venv/lib/python3.12/site-packages python3.13 -m black --check backend api && .venv/bin/python -m ruff check backend api && .venv/bin/python -m mypy; elif test -x .venv/bin/python; then .venv/bin/python -m black --check backend api && .venv/bin/python -m ruff check backend api && .venv/bin/python -m mypy; else python3 -m black --check backend api && python3 -m ruff check backend api && python3 -m mypy; fi
scripts.py:test: if test -x .venv/bin/python; then .venv/bin/python -m unittest discover backend -p '*_test.py'; else python3 -m unittest discover backend -p '*_test.py'; fi
scripts.check: npm run build && npm run py:check && npm run py:test
